title: cyclosorus glanduliferus
intro: Cyclosorus glanduliferus, also known as the glandular strap fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus glanduliferus include its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
